findings.evidence: `rg` shows line 70 declares `@[expose] noncomputable def orbitRelQuotientBotEquiv`, line 331 uses it only to define `subgroupFiberOrbitQuotientBotEquiv`, and lines 335-391 provide the public deck-level apply/equality/map lemmas needed downstream.
findings.fix: Make the generic helper private or define the deck-specific equivalence directly without exposing the generic body; keep only the deck-facing characteristic lemmas public.
findings.issue: `TauCeti.MulAction.orbitRelQuotientBotEquiv` is a new public generic equivalence with `@[expose]`, even though the roadmap target only needs the deck-specific `subgroupFiberOrbitQuotientBotEquiv` API and its simp lemmas.

summary: The deck-level bottom quotient API has the needed characteristic lemmas, but the PR still exposes a generic orbit-quotient implementation layer outside the named downstream surface.
